stories.title: Automatic phase transition detection
stories.i_want: the framework to warn when agents ask permission to proceed instead of auto-advancing
stories.so_that: workflow automation is not broken by unnecessary permission prompts
acceptance_criteria: AC-01a: Detects 'Would you like to proceed' pattern
AC-01b: Detects 'Ready to advance' pattern
AC-01c: Detects 'Should I continue' pattern
AC-01d: Detects 'Shall we proceed' pattern
AC-01e: Silent when no active workflow
AC-01f: Silent when no patterns found
AC-01g: Fails open on errors
AC-01h: Handles empty output gracefully

stories.title: Constitutional iteration gate enforcement
stories.i_want: gate advancement to be blocked when constitutional validation was not actually performed
stories.so_that: agents cannot skip constitutional compliance checks
acceptance_criteria: AC-02a: Blocks when completed is false
AC-02b: Blocks when iterations_used is 0
AC-02c: Blocks when articles_checked is empty
AC-02d: Allows when all fields correct
AC-02e: Allows non-gate invocations
AC-02f: Fails open on unreadable state
AC-02g: Fails open with no active workflow
AC-02h: Fails open when validation section missing

stories.title: Interactive menu halt detection
stories.i_want: the framework to warn when agents continue output after presenting an interactive menu
stories.so_that: interactive elicitation actually waits for my input
acceptance_criteria: AC-03a: Detects A/R/C menu followed by extra output
AC-03b: Detects numbered menu with Enter selection followed by extra output
AC-03c: Silent when menu is last content
AC-03d: Silent when no menu patterns detected
AC-03e: Fails open on all errors
AC-03f: Handles multiple menus (checks last one)

stories.title: Chat/Explore read-only enforcement
stories.i_want: Chat/Explore mode to block file writes to project files
stories.so_that: exploration cannot accidentally modify my codebase
acceptance_criteria: AC-04a: Blocks Write to project files in explore mode
AC-04b: Blocks Edit to project files in explore mode
AC-04c: Allows Write to /tmp in explore mode
AC-04d: Allows Write to state.json in explore mode
AC-04e: Allows all writes outside explore mode
AC-04f: Fails open on unreadable state
AC-04g: Detects mode from chat_explore_active field

stories.title: ATDD priority order enforcement
stories.i_want: test priority ordering to be validated during test execution
stories.so_that: P0 tests are implemented before P1, P1 before P2, etc.
acceptance_criteria: AC-05a: Detects P1 tests before P0 pass
AC-05b: Detects orphaned test.skip at P0
AC-05c: Silent when ATDD mode not active
AC-05d: Silent for non-test commands
AC-05e: Silent when ordering is correct
AC-05f: Fails open on all errors

stories.title: Artifact format validation
stories.i_want: known artifact files to be structurally validated when written
stories.so_that: malformed artifacts are caught early before they cause downstream failures
acceptance_criteria: AC-06a: Validates user-stories.json structure
AC-06b: Validates traceability-matrix.csv headers
AC-06c: Validates ADR required sections
AC-06d: Validates test-strategy.md sections
AC-06e: Silent for unrecognized files
AC-06f: Fails open on read/parse errors
AC-06g: Reports specific missing fields

stories.title: Upgrade test adequacy gate
stories.as_a: framework user running an upgrade workflow
stories.i_want: the upgrade to be blocked when test coverage is inadequate
stories.so_that: upgrades always have a regression baseline to validate against
acceptance_criteria: AC-07a: Blocks when total_tests is 0
AC-07b: Blocks when unit_test_pct below threshold
AC-07c: Allows when coverage adequate
AC-07d: Allows non-upgrade delegations
AC-07e: Fails open on unreadable state
AC-07f: Fails open when coverage data missing

stories.title: Centralized hook activity logging
stories.i_want: all hooks to log structured events to a centralized log file
stories.so_that: I can diagnose hook behavior, track blocks/warns, and audit enforcement
acceptance_criteria: AC-08a: logHookEvent function exists and is exported
AC-08b: Logs in JSONL format to hook-activity.log
AC-08c: Entries include hookName, eventType, phase, timestamp
AC-08d: Log rotation at 1MB
AC-08e: Log file path in .gitignore
AC-08f: Logging fails silently
AC-08g: New hooks use logHookEvent
AC-08h: Existing Phase 1 hooks updated to use logHookEvent
